rationale.root_cause: The response incorrectly identifies the root cause as an early exit in main(), which is unrelated to the actual bug in metadata.cpp.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested fix involves commenting out a call to exit_shell() in main.c, which does not address the issue in metadata.cpp.
